library_preparation_preflight.summary: micrometer-core is a metrics facade with usable in-process coverage through SimpleMeterRegistry, core meter APIs, and JVM/system binders using only normal transitive dependencies; no Docker service, environment variable, system property, or upfront extra test dependency is concretely required.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: No special environment or system properties are required. Meaningful tests can use in-process Micrometer APIs such as SimpleMeterRegistry, Counter, Timer, DistributionSummary, Gauge, Tags, MeterRegistry filters/configuration, and JVM/system MeterBinder classes.
risks: The artifact contains optional integration binders for libraries such as Dropwizard Metrics, Caffeine, Guava, Ehcache, JCache, Hazelcast, Hibernate/JPA, Jetty, Jersey, gRPC, HttpClient, OkHttp, MongoDB, jOOQ, Kafka, Reactor, AspectJ, and logging frameworks. Tests that intentionally exercise those optional binders will need the matching optional dependency, but this is not required before meaningful core coverage is reachable.
The artifact already ships native-image metadata for MXBean reflection; local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative for whether repository metadata is still needed.
